rules.headings_anti_pattern: Do not use Inter or generic sans for headings. Apply fluid scaling with limits.

rules.no_transparent_overlays: Never use completely transparent backgrounds for headers or overlays. Always use solid or heavily blurred glassmorphism.
rules.tactical_contrast: Use sharp contrasts. Actionable items should pop against structural grays.
rules.hover_states: Hover states must explicitly change text color and background color to ensure contrast (e.g., hover:bg-blue-700 hover:text-white).

surfaces.glassmorphism: For sticky headers or floating navs: backdrop-blur-xl bg-background/80 border-b border-border shadow-sm.
surfaces.forms_paper: For Intervention and Devis: Style the container like a physical A4 sheet. bg-white text-black shadow-lg mx-auto max-w-4xl p-8 sm:p-12 border border-slate-200 dark:bg-zinc-900 dark:text-zinc-100 dark:border-zinc-800.
surfaces.tactile_buttons: For Depot/Warehouse module: Use chunky buttons with solid borders and inset shadows to feel physical, ensuring easy taps with gloves.

icons.style: Clean, technical, consistent stroke width (1.5px to 2px).

login_pin_pad.structure: 3x4 grid of circular or large rounded-square buttons, similar to a physical POS terminal or ATM.

pos_caisse.layout: Split pane layout. Left: Grid of square product cards (image, name, quantity). Right: Cart/Ticket builder (Invoice style).
pos_caisse.cards: Square aspect ratio, image filling top 60%, content below. border border-border rounded-xl.

warehouse_depot.mobile_first: Must be designed for small tablets/phones. ALL actionable items must be massive (min-h-[64px]).
warehouse_depot.validation: Line-by-line touch validation with a numpad increment modal. High contrast green for confirmed, yellow for pending.

forms_interventions_devis.layout: A4 document layout. Use large HTML textareas for issue descriptions.
forms_interventions_devis.signature_pad: A distinctly styled rectangular canvas area with a 'Clear' button inside it. bg-slate-50 dark:bg-zinc-800 border-2 border-dashed border-border rounded-lg h-32 flex items-center justify-center.

fiche_reprise.phone_diagram: Use a generic smartphone SVG outline (front and back) where users can click to add markers (red dots/crosses) indicating defects.

internal_messaging.chat_interface: Standard message bubbles, left/right aligned. File attachment area. Ticket system with color-coded urgency tags (Low: Green, Medium: Yellow, High: Orange, Critical: Red).

grids_and_layouts.spacing_scale: Use generous spacing. p-6, p-8, p-12. Containers with borders must have internal padding.
grids_and_layouts.dashboard_grid: High Density Grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4). Tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6). Cards must use h-full.
grids_and_layouts.alignment: Mobile-first responsive. Left-align dense content. Optical alignment over geometrical.

rules.interactions: Hover states (slight lift -translate-y-[1px]), focus rings (ring-2 ring-primary ring-offset-background).
rules.transitions: Use specific transition properties, NEVER 'transition: all'. e.g., transition-colors duration-200, transition-transform.
rules.reduced_motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion media query for all animations.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text meets minimum 4.5:1 ratio.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case based on role (e.g., data-testid='pin-pad-button-1').
accessibility.focus: Visible focus states for keyboard navigation.

rules.overlays: Hero/Header background images must have an overlay (e.g., bg-black/60) if text is placed on them.

warehouse_worker.description: Man using a scanner in a warehouse, representing the Depot module.

avatar_professional.description: Professional bald man in suit, used for admin/manager avatar in messaging.

instructions_to_main_agent.language: French language must be used for all UI copy (Tableau de bord, Stock, Caisse, Interventions, Devis, Dépôt, Messagerie, Paramètres).
instructions_to_main_agent.theme: Implement a Dark/Light theme toggle globally accessible.
instructions_to_main_agent.libraries: Use Tailwind CSS for styling. Use Lucide-React for icons. Create a custom phone diagram component using basic SVG shapes for the trade-in form.
instructions_to_main_agent.ui_components: Use custom raw HTML/Tailwind for complex bespoke layouts like the A4 Intervention/Devis forms and PIN Pad. Use Shadcn for standard form inputs, dialogs, dropdowns.
instructions_to_main_agent.data_testid: Apply data-testid to every button, input, and link.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT.aesthetic: Avoid 'AI slop'. Do not use simplistic gradients or generic centered layouts. Use crisp, high-utility borders and solid colors.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT.depth: Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy and subtle ambient shadows.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT.interactions: Every interaction needs micro-animations (hover, active, focus).
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT.spacing: Use 2-3x more spacing than typical templates.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT.no_universal_transition: You MUST NOT apply universal transition (transition: all).
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT.no_centered_app: You MUST NOT center align the app container (.App { text-align: center; }).
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT.modern_buttons: Use sharp or slightly rounded (rounded-md) button styles with interaction animations. Never use AI emojis (🤖🧠) for icons.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT.toast: Use 'sonner' for toasts if notifications are needed.
